Message handling and communication for Pebble firmware, including inbox, outbox, and receiver management.


## Files
- **[app_message.c](app_message.c.md)**: Implements message handling for Pebble firmware, including protocol callbacks and developer interfaces.
- **[app_message.h](app_message.h.md)**: Header file for the AppMessage subsystem enabling bi-directional communication between phone apps and Pebble watchapps using key-value pairs.
- **[app_message_inbox.c](app_message_inbox.c.md)**: Functions for managing the app message inbox, including opening, closing, and handling messages.
- **[app_message_internal.h](app_message_internal.h.md)**: Defines internal structures and functions for handling app message communication in Pebble firmware.
- **[app_message_outbox.c](app_message_outbox.c.md)**: Manages the lifecycle and state transitions of the app message outbox, including sending messages and handling acknowledgments.
- **[app_message_receiver.c](app_message_receiver.c.md)**: Handles app message reception, including opening, closing, and processing messages in the inbox.
- **[app_message_receiver.h](app_message_receiver.h.md)**: Functions to open and close an app message receiver with a specified buffer size.
